description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a red-tiled gable roof and a compact, rectangular footprint. The front facade features a small porch area with visible steps and a few potted plants, giving it a welcoming appearance. The structure is surrounded by dense, mature trees and shrubbery, providing ample shade and privacy. The walls appear to be finished in a light-colored plaster or stucco, with several windows distributed across the visible sides. The roof is pitched and covered with terracotta tiles, typical of Mediterranean or Craftsman styles. The overall setting suggests a cozy, private home nestled within a lush garden environment.
description: A single-story bungalow with a red-tiled gable roof, light-colored walls, and a small front porch, surrounded by dense trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red-tiled roof, small porch, and main entrance, framed by thick greenery.
description_view_1: Side view mostly obscured by large trees, with only a small portion of the building visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the roof and back wall partially visible, surrounded by trees and a single isolated shrub in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the building nestled among dense foliage, with the roof and some windows visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
